title: Fresh Goat
description: *Fresh Goat* is a resource pack that reanimates the goat mob in Minecraft; inspired by the *Fresh Animations* resourcepack.
body:
Fresh Goat is a resource pack that reanimates the well-known Minecraft mob, the goat using the JEM's mod. 
The resource pack was inspired by the Fresh Animations resource pack, so I recommend using both together when playing to get a neat animated experience. 

Questions?

Why does the goat not have a (said action) animation?
- A. Need to wait until JEM's adds extended support.

Will you be adding more variants?
- A. Probably over time (but mainly when I want.)

Will you animate more mobs?
- A. I probably will but it will be another resource pack I make.

Here are some important links: 

(JEMs)
https://modrinth.com/mod/json-entity-models-jems

(Fresh Animations Resource pack)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations
